name: popo-sheet-automation
description: POPO Sheet automation tools for reading, collecting source content, writing matched data, formatting, and verifying NetEase POPO spreadsheets.

interface.shortDescription: Read, fill, format, and verify POPO sheets
interface.longDescription: A POPO Sheet automation tool for understanding live NetEase POPO spreadsheets, collecting or normalizing source content, writing matched text/link data, applying basic formatting, and verifying results through ShareDB snapshots.
defaultPrompt: Read this POPO sheet and identify the target columns
Collect the needed source data and fill matching rows
Format the filled range and verify the result
